title: Senior Business Development Manager at Puravankara International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Senior Business Development Manager at Puravankara International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
We at Puravankara International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Business Development Manager based out of Dhanbad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Puravankara International Enterprises:
Puravankara International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Puravankara International Enterprises!
